seoTitle: Bonnet Bay vs Bonnyrigg — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bonnet Bay and Bonnyrigg. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bonnet Bay vs Bonnyrigg: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bonnet Bay and Bonnyrigg.
heading: Bonnet Bay vs Bonnyrigg — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bonnet Bay, New South Wales and Bonnyrigg, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bonnet Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Bonnyrigg (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bonnet Bay or Bonnyrigg safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bonnet Bay has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Bonnyrigg scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bonnet Bay scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Bonnyrigg scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bonnet Bay or Bonnyrigg?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bonnet Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
